---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a change or addition to Bundles Forge
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
BEFORE FILING: Search open AND closed issues. Many features have been
requested before — some were implemented differently, some are in
progress, and some were intentionally declined.
-->

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this has not been proposed before

## What problem does this solve?
<!-- Describe the problem from your own experience. What were you doing,
     what went wrong or was missing, and why did it matter?

     "It would be cool if..." is not a problem statement. -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- What specifically do you want to happen? Be concrete. -->

## What alternatives did you consider?
<!-- What other approaches could solve the same problem? Why is your
     proposal better? -->

## Is this appropriate for the core toolkit?
<!-- Bundles Forge core contains skills, agents, scripts, hooks, and
     infrastructure that benefit all bundle-plugin authors. Ask yourself:

     - Would this benefit someone building a completely different kind
       of bundle-plugin?
     - Is this specific to your project, team, or a single platform?

     If this is specific to your domain or workflow, it may belong as
     your own plugin instead. -->

## Context
<!-- Optional: version info, platform, workflow where you hit this. -->
